calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint Of Terms Of Written Settlement Between The Parties
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint AND TO ENFORCE Terms Of Written Settlement Between The Parties IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
